localized_texts.text: Treasure Bay Bintan. A Gem of Possibilities.Treasure Bay is a 338-hectare waterfront resort city located on the Indonesian island of Bintan. The destination resort integrates wellness, leisure, cultural, residential and commercial real estate supported by infrastructure that adheres to international standards.	Treasure Bay Bintan’s Crystal Lagoon is South-East Asia’s first man-made seawater lagoon at 6.3 hectares. Here, you will find an extensive range of recreational and sporting activities suitable for all ages from dawn till dusk. The lagoon’s specially filtered seawater is delicate on the skin and provide perfect water conditions all year round. Future development surrounding the lagoon promises a vibrant and exciting host of dining, spa, retail, entertainment and night-life options catering to all your holiday needs and desires.
Unique Feature: Home to South-East Asia’s first man-made seawater lagoon.
Activities Galore: An extensive range of recreational activities for all ages.
Future Excitement: Upcoming dining, spa, retail, entertainment, and nightlife options.

Discover Treasure Bay Bintan: A Gem of PossibilitiesWelcome to Treasure Bay Bintan, a breathtaking 338-hectare waterfront resort city on the enchanting Indonesian island of Bintan. This premier destination seamlessly blends wellness, leisure, cultural, residential, and commercial experiences, all supported by world-class infrastructure.Experience the Marvel of Crystal LagoonDive into South-East Asia’s first man-made seawater lagoon, the stunning Crystal Lagoon, covering an impressive 6.3 hectares. This azure oasis offers pristine, specially filtered seawater that's gentle on your skin, ensuring perfect water conditions all year round.Endless Fun and AdventureFrom dawn till dusk, Crystal Lagoon is your playground. Enjoy a myriad of recreational and sporting activities designed for all ages. Whether you're seeking adrenaline-pumping water sports or tranquil relaxation, there's something for everyone.A Vision of Future LuxuryThe future shines bright at Treasure Bay Bintan. Exciting developments around the lagoon promise a vibrant array of dining, spa, retail, entertainment, and nightlife options. Indulge in gourmet cuisine, unwind in luxurious spas, shop till you drop, and experience vibrant nightlife, all set against the picturesque backdrop of this tropical paradise.
Dress code: There is no strict dress code, but it is recommended to wear comfortable clothing and shoes that you can get wet in
Dress code: Swimsuits are appropriate, but you may also want to bring along a cover-up.
Accessibility: Treasure Bay Bintan is accessible for guests with disabilities.
Weather: Bring sunscreen, sunglasses, and a hat.
Weather: If you are concerned about rain, you may want to bring a raincoat or an umbrella.
What’s included: 1 Day Entry Pass to Treasure Bay Bintan
What’s included: Enjoy Swimming in Crystal Lagoon
How to use: Show Mobile Ticket: Ticketing counter

Terms & Conditions: Admission Tickets are valid for all passport holders. All participants are required to sign an indemnity form before proceeding with the activities at Treasure Bay Bintan.Eligibility Children below 4 years old are entitled to free entry.Attraction Access Outside food and drinks are prohibited.Additional Information Activities are subject to weather conditions and may be postponed, changed, or cancelled without refund at the sole discretion of the operator.Important Notes Please bring spare undergarments, a towel, soap, sunscreen, and other personal essentials.
Cancellation Policy: No cancellation for this activity as per vendor policy
